cause: Train or test CSV file is missing from data/raw/ directory
resolution: Download Sign Language MNIST dataset from Kaggle and place sign_mnist_train.csv and sign_mnist_test.csv in data/raw/

message:
Model not found: {model_path}
Run `python src/train.py` first to train the model.
cause: Trained .h5 model file is missing from models/ directory
resolution: Run python src/train.py to train and save the model

cause: Video file path provided to --video argument does not exist
resolution: Check the video file path and ensure the file exists

cause: Webcam index is invalid or camera is in use by another application; or video file cannot be read
resolution: Check camera index (try --camera 1 for USB cameras); close other camera apps; verify video file format is supported

message:
Model not found: {model_path}
Run `python src/train.py` first to train and save the model.
resolution: Run python src/train.py to train and save the model before evaluating
